description: Dokploy MCP server for Codex, Cursor, and Claude with compact stdio and hosted HTTP modes
name: io.github.vcode-sh/dokploy-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional when local Dokploy credentials already exist. Otherwise provide the Dokploy panel URL.
environmentVariables.name: DOKPLOY_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional when local Dokploy credentials already exist. Otherwise provide the Dokploy API key.
environmentVariables.name: DOKPLOY_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional JSON object of named Dokploy targets. Use this when you want explicit named profiles in addition to the local default target.
environmentVariables.name: DOKPLOY_PROFILES_JSON

title: Dokploy MCP
